prompt: A pristine medical IV blood transfusion bag hanging in a stark white clinical room. At the top of the bag, the blood is a bright, clear, healthy crimson. As the eye moves down the bag, the liquid smoothly gradients and transforms into a dark, gritty, toxic slurry suspended with thousands of jagged, microscopic colorful plastic shards settling heavily at the very bottom. No text, no labels, high-end editorial macro photography, emotional contrast. Style: Cinematic
dataset_name: Discovery and quantification of plastic particle pollution in human blood (Environment International)
insight: The persistent, inescapable accumulation of microplastics in human blood as we age.
